title: Honey Mustard Prosciutto Palmiers
ingredients: 8 ounces frozen puff pastry sheet, thawed
4 ounces grated parmesan cheese (fresh) plus 1 tbsp for the finish
1 egg yolk whisked with 1 tbsp water
instructions: Lightly flour a work surface and roll out the pastry to a 6" by 15" rectangle.
In a small mixing bowl, combine the mustard, honey, and thyme.
Spread the mustard mixture evenly on the puff pastry.
Cover with the prosciutto slices and sprinkle with the 4 ounces cheese.
Tightly roll the long sides in to the middle.
Brush egg yolk mixture on the 2 surfaces where they meet in the middle of the roll.
Press the 2 sides firmly together without distorting the shape of the roll.
Place the roll on a tray and cover with plastic wrap.
Using a sharp knife, cut the roll into ¼" slices.
Place the slices on a sheet of parchment paper on a baking tray.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with reserved cheese while still warm.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
notes: Can be made ahead and frozen before baking or after cooking.
This recipe was made in large batches for wedding receptions.
